title: Conversation Scoring Engine

score_components.description: Awarded when a line is read / completed.
Awarded when line audio is played fully.
Awarded when student completes repeat practice.
Awarded for each correct conversation question.

mastery_promotion_rules: Move line from M0 to M1 after first completion.
Move line to M2 after one completed listen + one completed review.
Move line to M3 after correct comprehension linked to that line.
Move line to M4 after repeated strong sessions without translation.
